query: SELECT id, ghlCallId, contactName, contactPhone, duration, status, classification, classificationReason, recordingUrl, teamMemberName, callTimestamp, createdAt FROM calls WHERE contactName LIKE '%Brent%Walker%' OR contactName LIKE '%Walker%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
